content:
# Generated Built-in Plugin Inventory

This file is generated from the built-in profile descriptors.

Built-ins are declared as profile-scoped descriptors and are only materialized when a runtime selects those profiles.

Default `core-runtime` intentionally loads no built-in plugins.
